name: Elemental Transfiguration: Lava Blessing
title: Elemental Transfiguration: Lava Blessing
desc: Forged of fire and stone, might stands unyielding and eternal.
in_play_description:
Roll Phase: Always roll 2 Pyro Dice and 2 Geo Dice.
After you trigger Pyro-Crystallize reaction(s): Discard this card, then choose either Lava Blessing: Turnfire or Lava Blessing: Remelting and add it to your Hand.
